description: The AvatarRawEyeData component provides the eye tracking data on a particular User. This component links to a user upon being part of an Avatar that a user equips.

fields.LeftEye: Data about the left eye from the user's eye tracking device
fields.RightEye: Data about the right eye from the user's eye tracking device
fields.CombinedEye: Data about combined eye Data from the user's tracking device
fields.ConvergenceDistance: The User's eye tracking convergence distance data
fields.Timestamp: The timestamp value gotten directly from the eye tracking device.
fields._activeUser: The user that the component is reading eye tracking data from.
